text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the senior summer camp has come to an
end, and the fall showdown is fast approaching.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, we don't got nothin' to worry about now,
Boss. We made massive gains this summer.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, we don't got nothin' to worry about now,
Boss. We made massive gains this summer.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm not losin' to no one, not even Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Nope. There's just no way I'll lose.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, we better head back to the academy.
There's still more toughenin' up to do!
